2026-06-11TCTransportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada ActAppointment of a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of CanadaAppointment of John McKenna of Stoneham-et-Tewkesbury, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years.N/A
act: Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada Act
subject: Appointment of a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada
precis: Appointment of John McKenna of Stoneham-et-Tewkesbury, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years.
